title: TypedPage & Truths
heading: TypedPage & Single Truths
description: Understand how configurations drive page objects seamlessly.

sourceOfTruth.title: The Single Source of Truth
sourceOfTruth.description: Everything begins with a page configuration. This configuration strictly owns page URLs, testIds, and selectors.

typedPageApi.title: TypedPage API
typedPageApi.description: `TypedPage` is the base class of `pw-core`. When instantiated with a page configuration, it dynamically generates typed methods for all elements in the configuration.
